description: VERIFIED LIVE: зҲұеҘҮиүә (iQIYI) via content-script DOM extraction вҖ” no login, no API key. Video links use the /v_<id>.html path and carry the title in the link's title attribute. Navigate the tab to iqiyi.com (home or a channel like /dianshiju, /dianying) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: video links вҖ” title + url extracted correctly. Navigate to a channel/list page for more results.

tools.name: iqiyi_videos
tools.description: Video links on the current зҲұеҘҮиүә page (home or a channel/list). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each video's title and url (/v_<id>.html). VERIFIED.
